title: Missing-Value Matrix And Percentages
objective: Measure missingness by feature and display the row-feature missing-value pattern.
method: Computed missing counts/percentages and rendered a binary missingness matrix ordered by source site.
results: Total missing cells across analysis columns: 1759.
Most-missing feature is ca with 611 missing rows (66.41%).
warnings: Missing values and site-level sampling differences may affect all estimates.
Missingness is structured, not random-looking; complete-case analysis would discard much of the dataset.
